pallavi.meaning: O Goddess, now is the time to protect me — show your compassion.

anupallavi.original: భావజ జనకి పాలిత లోకే పాహి పాహి మాం
anupallavi.iast: bhāvaja janaki pālita lōkē pāhi pāhi māṃ
anupallavi.meaning: O mother of the one born of the mind (Manmatha), protector of worlds — protect me, protect me.

charanams.meaning: O Kamakshi, resident of Kanchipuram, abode of compassion.
